description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes C/C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push to the main branch, on pull requests to the main branch excluding certain files, and on a weekly schedule. Use a windows-latest job with a 6-hour timeout that checks out the repository, installs Ninja, sets up the MSVC development environment, initializes CodeQL for C/C++, configures CMake, builds the project, and performs CodeQL analysis.
